strategy_notes: DIFFERENTIAL play for the final GW chasing rank gains over safety. Contrarian captain ANDERSON (NFO): tops the overall xPts board at 9.03 (18.06 captained), well above template Haaland (12.80 captained) who carries MCI final-day rotation risk. The field captains Haaland/Salah, so a green Anderson armband is the maximum-leverage swing. Punts under ~8% ownership: E.Le Fée (SUN MID, 7.45 xpts, set-piece upside), Truffert + Senesi (BOU defensive double-up, 8.61 & 8.14 xpts, both contrarian), and Gibbs-White (NFO, 8.35 xpts) as a paired Forest attacking differential alongside Anderson. Nottingham Forest double-stack (Anderson + Gibbs-White) is the core variance bet. Virgil + Szoboszlai give a Liverpool spine for floor. 3-4-3 attacking shape maximises ceiling; bench Dúbravka/Thiaw/O'Reilly are pure cover. No chip available context-wise — pure transfer-driven differential build. Accept high variance: this team boom-or-busts but has the highest realistic upside if Forest deliver at home.
